title: A2A Task Request
description: Contract 3 — Agent-to-Agent task delegation request message. The message body is data; authority (delegation chain) travels in the Bearer JWT, never in this body. The `input` object's total serialized size MUST NOT exceed 256 KiB. `idempotency_key` is required when `mode` is `async` (re-delivery with the same key within 24h returns the original task_id with no re-execution). `task_type` MUST be drawn from the published task-type registry (a2a/task-types.md); unknown task types are rejected with VALIDATION_ERROR. Request-body schema: stricter than envelopes but tolerant of unknown OPTIONAL metadata under `metadata`.

task_id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this task.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this contract schema, e.g. "1.0.0".

idempotency_key.description: UUID v4 idempotency key. REQUIRED when mode=async. Re-delivery with the same key within 24h returns the original task_id with no re-execution.

sender_agent_id.description: Agent UUID of the delegating (sending) agent.

receiver_agent_id.description: Agent UUID of the receiving agent.

tenant_id.description: Organisation/tenant UUID that owns this task.

task_type.description: Task type drawn from the published task-type registry (a2a/task-types.md). Unknown task types are rejected with VALIDATION_ERROR.

priority.description: Scheduling priority. Defaults to `normal` when omitted.

input.description: Task-type-specific input payload. Total serialized size MUST NOT exceed 256 KiB.

callback_url.description: HTTPS callback URL for async/stream results. Receiver MUST enforce https scheme, public-IP host (reject RFC1918/loopback/link-local/metadata), per-tenant allow-list, and HMAC-SHA256 signing.

timeout_seconds.description: Task timeout in seconds, in [1, 900] (max 15 minutes). Receivers reject anything outside that range.

span_id.description: UUID v4 span identifier for this hop.

produced_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) when this message was produced.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata. Unknown OPTIONAL keys are tolerated here.

$comment: additionalProperties:true is intentional and required for forward-compatibility — this is an A2A wire envelope that later phases (Phase 10) extend (e.g. workflow_id, parent_task_id, protocol_version). Receivers MUST tolerate unknown top-level fields; field-level validation still applies to known fields. Matches sibling task-response and delegation schemas.
